welcome.heading: Welcome to Export
welcome.intro: Here you can download your complete family tree as a CSV file for use in Excel, or as a JSON file for a full backup that you can import again later.

csv.heading: Export as CSV
csv.body: A CSV file can be opened in Excel, Google Sheets or any other spreadsheet application. You can view, edit and re-import the data via the import page.
csv.chromeTip: On Chrome or Edge (HTTPS) you will get a "Save as" dialog to choose your own storage location. On other browsers the file is automatically saved to your downloads folder.

json.heading: 🚧 Export as JSON
json.body: A JSON file is a complete backup of your family tree including all fields. Store this file in a safe place so you never lose your data.
json.note: The file is automatically saved to your downloads folder with the date in the filename.

status.browserWarning: This browser does not support location selection. The file will be saved to your downloads folder.
status.failed: Export failed. See console for details.
